title: C, C++, Objective-C analysis overview | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# C/C++/Objective-C analysis overview

## [Supported versions](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/overview/#supported-versions "Supported versions ")

The level of support for a language is defined as follows:

- Fully supported: Analysis will complete. All the language features are understood and examined.
- Supported: Most language features are understood and examined but the version includes unsupported features. Analysis might break or provide incomplete results.

### [C](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/overview/#c "C")

- C89, C99, C11, C17: Fully supported
- C23: Supported
- GNU extensions: Supported

### [C++](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/overview/#c "C++")

- C++20, C++23: Supported
- C++03,  C++11, C++14, C++17: Fully supported
- GNU extensions: Supported

This section covers the following topics:

- [Analysis modes](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/analysis-modes/ "Analysis modes")
- [Prerequisites](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/prerequisites/ "Prerequisites ")
- [Running the analysis](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/running-the-analysis/ "Running the analysis")
- [Customizing the analysis](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/customizing-the-analysis/ "Customizing the analysis")
- [Understanding the analysis](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/understanding-the-analysis/ "Understanding the analysis")
- [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/c-family/related-pages/ "Related pages")
